headline: Revvity Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., April 30, 2026--The Board of Directors of Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY), today declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.07 per share of common stock. This dividend is payable on August 7, 2026 to all shareholders of record at the close of business on July 17, 2026.
